SafetyAgent.name: Safety Goal
SafetyAgent.description: Safety objective for AD: The system must minimize "Jerk" (rate of change of acceleration) to ensure passenger comfort

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 1
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): The system must minimize "Jerk" (rate of change of acceleration) to ensure passenger comfort
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 2
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): - Curvature constraints ($kappa$) must be satisfied to prevent rollover or tire slip
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 3
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): - Non-convex obstacle constraints must be handled using iterative quadratic programming (QP)
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 5
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): - The SafetyAgent prioritizes "Passive Safety" and strictly enforcing safe distances and MRM execution
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 6
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): - The EfficiencyAgent prioritizes "Smoothness" and "Speed" using the QP function to minimize Jerk
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation
